Tests the `toString` method of the `Boolean` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `Boolean` object in JavaScript. It checks if the `toString` method of a `Boolean` object with the value `true` returns the string `"true"`. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing specifically on the conversion of a `Boolean` object to its string representation. The use of `assert` indicates that the code is intended to confirm expected behavior, and it will throw an error if the condition is not met.
